offer: For medical billing specialists processing 20–50 invoices/month, missed billing reminders cause cash flow gaps. We consolidate patient billing reminders instead of manual tracking of billing reminders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo videos to specialists
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual scheduling and consolidated view on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import feature for existing data
